# ancsAuthorized

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value that indicates if the remote device has authorization to receive data over ANCS protocol.

## Declaration

```swift
var ancsAuthorized: Bool { get }
```

## Discussion

If this value is [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false], a user authorization sets this value to [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true], which results in a call to the delegate’s [doc://com.apple.corebluetooth/documentation/CoreBluetooth/CBCentralManagerDelegate/centralManager(_:didUpdateANCSAuthorizationFor:)] method.
title: ancsAuthorized
